title: Mega Bloks CNF59 Monster Build A Minion Toy, Tri-Indigo,Yellow, 0
features: Fully buildable large-scale Minion Kevin stands 15.5 inches tall and assembles in sections for easy customization
Includes one regular size buildable Minion Bob character figure with removable parts, like overalls, goggles, arms and feet
Collect and combine with other Mega Bloks Minions playsets to build your own Minion mischief!
description: From the manufacturer Why choose Mattel? Mattel have been making children smile for over 50 years with iconic toy brands such as Barbie, Hot Wheels, and Fisher-Price. We create and produce some of the world's most beloved toys for children and we know that with this comes the responsibility to ensure quality and safety. Building lasting memories, helping children smile, laugh and learn is what we do. Mega Bloks Minions – Build-a-Minion It doesn’t get much bigger than this for Minions fans. Kevin, like you’ve never seen him before – large and in charge in Build-A-Minion by Mega Bloks Minions. This jumbo-sized buildable Kevin assembles to stand over a foot tall, with sections that come apart and rearrange easily, making it a snap to customise your Minion. Turn Kevin’s frown into a smile, change his height, give him a different pose, or open and close the pocket on his overalls. The set also comes with a regular size buildable Minion Bob character, so Kevin can bring his friend with him on a mission to save all of Minion-kind! Fully buildable large-scale Minion Kevin stands at nearly 40cm tall and assembles in sections for easy customisation Includes one regular size buildable Minion Bob character figure with removable parts, like overalls, goggles, arms and feet Collect and combine with other Mega Bloks Minions playsets to build your own Minion mischief Ages: 5 years+ Highlights Building History For over 25 years, Mega Bloks construction toys have been loved by children and trusted by parents. With their colour and shape, and funny looks, the Mega Bloks Minions line is ideal for little hands with big imaginations. A Big Deal This is no ordinary Minion. Kevin stands at nearly 40 cm tall, with sections that come apart so you can easily customise him. Towering over the city, Kevin is on a mission to save all Minion-kind! Buildable Despicable Fun Turn Kevin’s frown upside down, and give him a smile, or even change his height by adding or removing sections of his head. Change his pose and pop open his pocket so he can carry his Minion friend Bob around. Kevin and Bob Together! Just so he doesn't feel lonely, Kevin comes with a regular size buildable Minion Bob character. The colossal Kevin is so big he can fit Bob in his front pocket.
